calendar.matters:
RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Set For Trial On Nov-03-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: BELLA THURY, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT, IN PRO PER
PAUL KROUPA AND TONY ZIZZO, RESPONDENTS/PLAINTIFFS, IN PRO PER

This cause came on regularly for small claims appeal on this day. Court and parties are present as indicated above. Court and parties discussed the disputed security deposit at the subject premises on Liberty Street. The following documentary evidence was introduced:

Appellant/Defendant's Exhibits:
A. 8 Photographs of Damaged tiles and wood siding
B. Letter re Rental Deposit dated 2/18/04

Respondent/Plaintiffs' Exhibits:
1. 15 Photographs of disputed damages, in plastic album
2. Blue binder of evidence, 8-1/2 x 11"
3. Photographs of damaged tiles (3) and BART station (1)
4. Marble Tile, 12"x12".

Judgment is ordered in favor of Respondent/Plaintiff, Paul Kroupa and against Appellant/Defendant, Bela Thury in the amount of $347.25 principal and $32.00 costs for a total judgment of $379.25. Thury Enterprises is dismissed. Exhibits are ordered returned.

Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (514).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Continued To Nov-03-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
